businessBackground: Energy Recovery designs, manufactures, and sells pressure exchanger (PX) devices that recover and recycle energy in industrial fluid-flow processes. The company's core market is seawater reverse osmosis (SWRO) desalination, where its PX devices reduce energy consumption by up to 60%. ERII holds ~90% market share in large-scale SWRO pressure exchangers globally, with 35,000+ units deployed across 7 continents serving 70+ million people daily.
catalysts: 2027-2028: Saudi SWRO plant FIDs converting to ERII POs
2040-2050: Replacement wave (bulk of 35,000+ units from 2010-2020 wave)

V1.name: Fundamentals Trajectory
V1.rationale: Core water OI growing ~13% CAGR ($42.7M→$62.0M), but FY2026 revenue declining to $127.5M midpoint. CO2 exit adds ~$7M savings. Gross margin recovery to 67-68% post-CO2 (compression was fixed-cost dilution + CO2 drag, not structural). Management credibility 3/5 (CO2 reversal). CEO Moon open-market purchase May 2024. No structural capital allocation constraints (zero debt = full discretion). (Source: 10-K FY2022-2025 segment data; Perplexity Round 2 Section 3)

V2.name: Valuation Mismatch
V2.rationale: Stock at $9.87 trades **$1.89 BELOW bear case FV** ($11.76). Prob-weighted FV $19.49 (+97%). Base FV $19.35 (+96%). Market gives negative credit for monopoly persistence. Cross-check P/E confirms ($19.93, 2% convergence). Asymmetry: infinite (positive return in all scenarios). (Source: Models/2026-03-29_ERII_valuation_analysis.md, updated)

V3.name: Identifiable Mispricing Reason
V3.rationale: All Drawdown causes confirmed IRRATIONAL or TRANSIENT-and-addressed. **SWPC vs SWA resolved** (SWPC IWP dominant; Saudi de-risked). Self-correcting mechanism now visible: Amundi +323% QoQ accumulation = institutional discovery starting. Q1 2026 earnings = dated forcing function. All analysts Buy (avg PT ~$15, lowest $12 = +22%). Short interest 2.8% (benign). Not in water ETFs = no passive pressure. Pure expectations reset by generalist holders. (Source: Perplexity Round 2 Sections 1, 4)

V4.name: Downside Protection
V4.rationale: Pre-mortem below. Net cash $83.3M ($1.54/share) = hard floor. Aftermarket $20.2M provides ~$10-12/share standalone floor. Bear FV $11.76 > current $9.87. ~~SWPC vs SWA binary unknown~~ — **RESOLVED** (SWPC dominant). (Source: 10-K FY2025 p.46, p.35; valuation model; Perplexity Round 2 Section 1)

V5.name: Thesis Simplicity
V5.rationale: 2 conditions: (1) Global SWRO demand continues — HOLDING (IDA 14.8M m³/day new capacity through 2030); (2) ERII maintains 85%+ PX share — HOLDING (zero displacement in 21 transcripts, FLEX at zero wins). Everything else is optionality.

V6.name: Upside Optionality
V6.rationale: 5 paths: Saudi pipeline acceleration, PX Q650 adoption, aftermarket/replacement wave (~2030), analyst discovery (3-5→8-10, Northcoast initiated), wastewater expansion (India/US/S. America). 2 showing early evidence (Saudi contract in hand, Northcoast initiation).

V7.name: Evidence Quality
V7.rationale: 7 audited SEC filings + 21 transcripts + 3 Perplexity reports (62+52+52 source citations). Core thesis on [FACT] data. ~~SWPC vs SWA~~ resolved. Remaining minor DATA GAPs: manufacturing location (mid-2026), goodwill impairment amount (Q1 10-Q), FLEX traction (monitoring). No critical gaps in financial baseline or thesis assumptions.

V8.name: Catalyst Clarity
V8.rationale: Q1 2026 earnings (~May 2026) is dated and specific. But thesis-realizing catalysts (Saudi pipeline execution, Q650 adoption, analyst discovery) are unscheduled. No hard forcing function (no index event, no activist).
